issues.title: PDF chunking loses section headers for long policy documents
issues.description: The chunker splits mid-section on documents over ~40 pages, dropping the header that gives later chunks their context.
issues.context: Found while chunking the 80-page policy PDF from project-context/.
issues.impact: Retrieval on long documents may return chunks without enough context to be useful standalone.
issues.suggested_resolution: Carry the nearest preceding header forward into each chunk's metadata.

issues.title: Working directory contains no code - documented Phase 1-3 deliverables are missing
issues.description: PROJECT_STATE and PHASE_LOG report Phases 1-3 complete with specific files created (pyproject.toml, docker-compose.yml, .env.example, src/ingestion/shopify_loader.py, src/ingestion/confluence_loader.py, src/ingestion/pdf_loader.py, src/embeddings/client.py, src/vectorstore/pgvector.py). None of these exist in the working directory. There is also no git repository, no DEPENDENCY_MANIFEST.md/.json, no MODEL_REGISTRY.md/.json, and .project/ADR/ is empty despite two decisions (BGE-M3 over OpenAI; PyMuPDF over pdfplumber) that warrant an ADR.
issues.context: Found while re-reading the existing codebase at session start, before trusting that Phase 4 (Retrieval Pipeline) can build on a 'live' Phase 3 vector store and embedding client.
issues.impact: Phase 4 depends concretely on Phase 3's vector store and embedding client code. If that code doesn't exist, Phase 4 cannot start from the assumed foundation.
issues.suggested_resolution: Ask the user whether the code exists elsewhere (wrong/stale working directory), was lost and needs recreating, or whether Phases 1-3 should be redone using the existing docs as a spec. Do not proceed into Phase 4 until resolved.
